name: amazon-display-sakurachecker
description: Chrome extension that shows Sakura Checker score images on Amazon.co.jp product pages.

scripts.test: node --test tests/parser.test.js tests/rendered-score-parser.test.js tests/rendered-score-client.test.js tests/api-client.test.js tests/content-flow.test.js
scripts.test:deploy: npm run test && npm run test:live
